final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that there is no checking account, because it is associated with a lower estimated risk, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that the savings account balance is below 100, because minimal balances do not reliably predict default likelihood, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [2]
The fact that employment duration is between 4 and 7 years, because there is no empirical data regarding employment duration, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

evidence_sentences.sentence: Longer loan durations, larger credit amounts, and higher installment rates are associated with a higher likelihood of being classified as a bad credit risk.

Empirical work has exam- ined how demographic characteristics, such as age and marital status, and loan terms, such as loan size and interest rate, affect the borrower’s ability to repay on time (Özdemir, 2008).
(i.e. the default probability) increases for longer maturity time, whereas from roughly four years (45 months) onwards the risk stays constantly high.
evidence_sentences.source: How much do we see? On the explainability of partial dependence plots for credit risk scoring.pdf

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족은 신용 위험을 낮추는 신호로 인식되며, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다. [1]
저축 잔액이 100 미만인 경우는 채무 불이행 가능성 예측에 신뢰성이 낮아 신용 위험을 낮추는 요인으로 간주되며, 본 모델 역시 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 식별합니다. [2]
고용 기간이 4~7년인 것은 고용 기간과 채무 불이행 간의 실증적 데이터 부족으로 인해 신용 위험을 낮추는 요인으로 여겨지며, 본 모델 또한 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다. [3]
전반적으로 신용 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가되어 대출 승인 가능성이 높습니다.
